name: Pricing and Promotions
body:
[{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Pricing"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You set the base price here, and if needed, you can use promotions tab to set pricing or discounts conditions. This is useful if you want to sell at a different price in a physical store versus online, or in different marketplaces."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"MCC let you create "},{"text":"discount campaigns","bold":true},{"text":" for specific products, customer groups, or entire orders. These can be amount-based, percentage-based, or provide free shipping."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Promotion Types","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Amount Off Products","bold":true},{"text":" – Fixed value off products or the entire cart.
"},{"text":"Example:","italic":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"$10 off jackets","code":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"$50 off total order","code":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Percentage Off Products","bold":true},{"text":" – Reduces price by a set percentage.
"},{"text":"Example:","italic":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"20% off sneakers","code":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"100% off","code":true},{"text":" for a giveaway."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Free Shipping","bold":true},{"text":" – Removes delivery charges for eligible orders.
"},{"text":"Example:","italic":true},{"text":" "},{"text":"Free shipping on orders over $50","code":true},{"text":"."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DV5CALFEYBOH/70ea0d19-7154-412d-9486-965a94d4cef0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/DV5CALFEYBOH/70ea0d19-7154-412d-9486-965a94d4cef0.png","name":"70ea0d19-7154-412d-9486-965a94d4cef0.png","type":"image/png","size":797711,"width":1234,"height":676,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FDV5CALFEYBOH%2F70ea0d19-7154-412d-9486-965a94d4cef0.png","active":true,"mediaID":1186,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T10:46:16+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Setup percentage, per product or entire cart)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Eligibility (Who can use this code?)","bold":true},{"text":" – Choose customer attributes (e.g., Customer Group, Region) and matching rules."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Item Conditions","bold":true},{"text":" – Specify product attributes or categories the promotion applies to (Product, collection, Tags)."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Discount Usage","bold":true},{"text":" – Set maximum quantity per order, optionally limit to once per customer."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Activate Dates","bold":true},{"text":" – Start and end date/time for the
